title: Wels, Upper Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wels, Upper Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wels is a city in Upper Austria with a population of 63,181. A historic city in Upper Austria with a well-preserved medieval old town, known for its agricultural trade fairs and the Wels Castle.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
